description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a slim, matte black bezel. The screen is wide and appears to display a warning message with various graphical interface elements, suggesting it is used for information or alert purposes. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, round pedestal stand with a cylindrical neck, providing stability and a professional appearance. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with a subtle contour for structural support. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile and the stand's compact footprint, making it suitable for desks or control stations in urban environments. No visible buttons, ports, or branding are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sleek, flat-panel computer monitor with a slim black bezel and a round pedestal stand, featuring a wide display and a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide display area with a warning message and graphical interface, framed by a thin black bezel and supported by a round stand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the cylindrical neck of the pedestal stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, unmarked back panel with subtle contours and the central attachment of the stand.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the thinness of the monitor and the round base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, with straight edges and sharp corners, providing a modern, unobtrusive frame around the display area. No decorative elements or color contrast are present.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a round pedestal type with a cylindrical neck and a circular base, made of matte black plastic or coated metal, offering stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
